summary: Completed frontend-only usability regression on Template Library page (public URL) for overview visibility, clone flow, default collapse states, expand/collapse behavior, reorder persistence, variable-group collapse behavior, and visual color hierarchy.

Optional code-quality follow-up: split TemplatesPage.jsx into smaller components and reduce duplicated variable-row rendering logic.

Section/subsection variable row rendering contains sizable duplicated logic that can be extracted into reusable UI components/hooks.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (requested usability/integration checks passed in targeted run)

seed_data_creation: Created one cloned template via UI flow (name prefix: TEST_clone_ui_) and saved reordered section sequence on one existing 4-section template.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Template overview renders all templates; clone from existing works for admin; sections and variable groups are collapsed by default and expand on demand; section reorder persisted after Save + reload. Note: test run intentionally modified section order on one existing 4-section template.
rca of the issue: No functional defects found for the requested template usability scope.
